content: Jonas lived a block down from Amelia.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Amastan (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ber:Axxam n Jonas yella yebɛed s yiwen n yiḥder ɣef win n Amelia
ber:Taddart n Jonas tella teggug s yiwen n yiḥder ɣef win n Amelia
